history.text:
Analyze this image and generate an EXTREMELY DETAILED, LONG, and highly descriptive AI image generation prompt based EXACTLY on the structure below. Every section must be comprehensively detailed.

Format Required:
make picture ultra-realistic
subject: [ONLY mention the gender here without any physical traits. Example: "a man", "a woman", "a man and a woman"]
Angel kamera/framing: [Describe the camera angle, framing, and composition in extreme detail. Match the reference exactly (e.g., selfie, full body, collage style, design UI overlay)]
Outfit: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the clothing, materials, textures, folds, styling, and accessories]
pose: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the body posture, hand positions, facial expression, and micro-expressions]
enviroment: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the background, props, atmosphere, and specific surrounding elements]
lighting: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the light direction, shadows, ambient light, mood, and reflections]
Final style: [Highly detailed, high resolution. Add "handheld", "iPhone photography look", "candid photo", "not too perfect". If there is a framing design/collage in the reference, emphasize that the final output MUST match that specific framing/design style exactly]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the requested format text above. No markdown blocks (```), no introductory text, no explanations.
- Write all descriptions in English.
- The descriptions MUST be extremely long and highly detailed to produce a high resolution image with an amateur/iPhone handheld feel.

Negative Prompt:
worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limbs, deformed iris, fused fingers, distorted face, unnatural skin, plastic, uncanny valley

make picture ultra-realistic
subject: a woman
Angel kamera/framing: Medium shot, eye-level camera angle, capturing the woman from the chest up, with a slight tilt to the right. The composition is framed by a large, circular window on the left side, creating a natural vignette effect. The foreground features a portion of a table on the left and the back of a patterned seat on the right. The background visible through the window is slightly out of focus.
Outfit: She is wearing a form-fitting, sleeveless, spaghetti-strap dress made of a soft, matte, light beige fabric with a subtle ribbed texture. The dress drapes elegantly, accentuating her figure. Over her shoulders and arms, she has a loosely draped, lightweight cardigan or shawl in a slightly lighter, creamy beige color, made of a thin, slightly sheer material. The fabric of the shawl is creased and casually arranged, suggesting it was recently put on or taken off. A delicate, thin silver necklace with a small pendant is visible around her neck. On the table to her left, a white, textured scrunchie and a chunky, silver chain bracelet are placed.
pose: The woman is seated and turned slightly towards the camera, with her body angled to her left. Her head is turned to face the viewer directly, with a gentle smile on her lips and her eyes looking directly at the camera. Her left arm rests on the table, with her hand casually placed near the scrunchie and bracelet. Her right arm is bent, with the hand resting on her lap or the side of the dress, partially covered by the draped shawl. Her posture is relaxed yet poised.
enviroment: The setting appears to be inside a vehicle, likely a train or an airplane, given the large, circular window and the seat upholstery. The window looks out onto an airport or industrial area with buildings, structures, and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. The interior of the vehicle features dark wood paneling on the wall and a brown, textured fabric on the side of the seat. The table in the foreground is a light beige color. The atmosphere is calm and serene, with a sense of travel and anticipation.
lighting: The scene is bathed in warm, natural daylight coming from the right side, outside the window. This light illuminates the woman's face and body from the side and front, creating soft highlights and gentle shadows that define her features and the textures of her clothing. The light coming through the window casts a soft glow on the interior of the vehicle. There are subtle reflections on the window surface, hinting at the interior elements. The overall mood is bright, airy, and slightly ethereal.
Final style: Highly detailed, high resolution. handheld, iPhone photography look, candid photo, not too perfect
